query:
ALTER TABLE sessions 
ADD COLUMN approvalStatus ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'approved' NOT NULL AFTER status,
ADD COLUMN requestedBy INT AFTER approvalStatus,
ADD COLUMN reviewedBy INT AFTER requestedBy,
ADD COLUMN reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER reviewedBy;
